sizing_rule.note: Use Black-Scholes to calculate one standard deviation of underlying price (Std. Dev. = U*EXP(V*(T^(1/2)))). This volatility distribution informs optimal_f iteration for position sizing. optimal_f determined through iterative optimization per Step 7. Volatility-adjusted sizing.

source_rule_text: Calculate one standard deviation above a given underlying price using the Black-Scholes model to determine option price probability distributions for position sizing decisions.
